data.name: Belka

weaponImprint.name: Sylvan Elf
weaponImprint.trait: If the user has full HP at the end of the action, she gains a random buff, lasting for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Every point of mobility expended before attacking increases damage dealt by 5%/6%/7%/8%/9%/10%, up to a maximum of 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. If the target has [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Electric damage dealt is increased by 15%/17%/19%/21%/23%/25%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to the URNC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target is afflicted with any Electric debuffs, this damage is additionally increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: Her innocence, liveliness, and harmless little scheming are written on her face. Absolutely loyal to the Commander and her big sister, she is a Doll who strives to become an elite Doll loved by everyone. With her around, awkward silences are no longer a thing!

skills.name: Nutcracker Shell
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Forest's Secrets
skills.description:
At the start of the turn, Belka gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When attacking, applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 1 turn to the target and the closest enemy to it.

If the attack kills the enemy target, Belka gains [effect:ebb94ca6-620c-4fe6-ab91-3c65d506c37e]. Every time an allied unit applies 1 stack of [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Belka's critical rate is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Before attacking, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] for 1 turn to the enemy target.

If the target has [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], ignores 10% of its defense.

When Belka deals targeted Electric damage to a target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], the multiplier of the fixed damage of [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is increased to 40%.

Each time an allied unit deals Electric damage, Belka gains 1 stack of [effect:63ac9c84-5a40-460c-ab38-8c959e608e6e].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
At the start of the battle, Belka increases her mobility and range by 1 tile.

The maximum number of [effect:63ac9c84-5a40-460c-ab38-8c959e608e6e] stacks increases by 4. Each time Belka deals Electric damage, she gains an additional stack of [effect:63ac9c84-5a40-460c-ab38-8c959e608e6e].

skills.name: Sylvan Vault
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to it.

The damage dealt by this attack is increased by (3% × the number of [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623]) on the battlefield, to a maximum increase of 15%. If the target is a boss unit which has [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], the damage dealt is directly increased by 15%.

If a critical hit is dealt, Belka gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After using the skill, selects an empty tile within 6 tiles and charges towards it.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to it.

The critical damage dealt by this attack is increased by 30%. The damage dealt by this attack is increased by (6% × the number of [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623]) on the battlefield, to a maximum increase of 30%. If the target is a boss unit which has [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], the damage dealt is directly increased by 30%.

If a critical hit is dealt, Belka gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After using the skill, selects an empty tile within 6 tiles and charges towards it.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Stability damage is increased by 2 points.

The critical damage dealt by this attack is increased by 30%.

The damage dealt by this attack is increased by (6% x the number of [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623]) on the battlefield, to a maximum increase of 30%.

If the target is a boss unit which has [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], the damage dealt is directly increased by 30%.

skills.name: Crackling Core
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 130% of attack to it. Each point of mobility expended increases the damage multiplier by 5%. Belka gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b]. After using this skill, Belka can use the active skill Sylvan Vault or her basic attack Nutcracker Shell.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 130% of attack to it. Each point of mobility expended increases the damage multiplier by 8%. Damage dealt to enemies with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is increased by 15%. Belka gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b]. After using this skill, Belka can use the active skill Sylvan Vault or her basic attack Nutcracker Shell.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Each point of mobility expended additionally increases the damage multiplier by 3%. Damage dealt to enemies with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is increased by 15%.

skills.name: Leaping Arc
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing Electric damage equal to 160% of attack to it. Each point of mobility expended increases the damage multiplier by 5%. Applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] to the enemy target for 1 turn. Belka gains [effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Belka gains 1 stack of [effect:92c897fb-6469-4746-9cdf-ff28c46af53b|doll:belka].

[effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52] gains new effects: If the target of [effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52] this turn is the same as the target of this skill, applies [effect:e809a359-05d8-42fa-9f90-abf087a5584d] to it for 2 turns before the attack resolves.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Each point of mobility expended additionally increases the damage multiplier by 5%. The damage multiplier of [effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52] is increased by 30%.

If the target has 2 or more Electric debuffs, critical damage increases by 30%.

keys.keyTitle: The Will to Fight for Favor
keys.effect: Increases damage dealt by 10% if this unit expends mobility.
keys.displayTitle: Common Key - The Will to Fight for Favor

keys.effect:
Damage dealt by active skill Sylvan Vault is changed to Electric Damage, and increase the critical damage of this attack by 5% for each [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] on the field, up to 25%.

When using active skill Crackling Core or Ultimate skill Leaping Arc, if movement point expended is less than 10, damage will be calculated as if 10 movement points were expended.
When [effect:ebb94ca6-620c-4fe6-ab91-3c65d506c37e] ends, Belka recovers 30% of maximum HP and 4 points of stability.
If Belka has [effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52], she becomes immune to movement displacement effects.
At the start of the turn, if there are enemy units within 5 tiles of self, Belka gains [effect:2eaedbcb-e86c-431a-ac54-2fcb00ebfb70] for 2 turns.
When using the active skill Crackling Core to attack an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Belka's attack is increased by 10%.

At the end of the action, if there is a boss unit on the field with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Belka gains [effect:d9460e7f-212e-467f-91bc-bfee83202ada] and [effect:6fd51e21-f25d-4ef4-b554-e00aef225a58] for 1 turn.
Before the Ultimate Skill Leaping Arc resolves, Belka cleanses 2 buffs from the enemy target.

vertebrae.effect: Each point of mobility expended additionally increases the damage multiplier by 3%. Damage dealt to enemies with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is increased by 15%.

doll.name: Belka
doll.effects: Her innocence, liveliness, and harmless little scheming are written on her face. Absolutely loyal to the Commander and her big sister, she is a Doll who strives to become an elite Doll loved by everyone. With her around, awkward silences are no longer a thing!

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Electric debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
After inflicting a critical hit, deals 3 points of fixed stability damage to the enemy target. This effect can trigger up to 2 times per turn.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Attacks deal Electric damage. Damage dealt is increased by 30%. Activates once. Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

At the end of the buff holder's action, deals 1 instance of Electric damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the closest enemy target within 8 tiles. Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"a00c9fbf-0cc4-4da0-9798-aa9b23238f77","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the buff holder's action, deals 1 instance of Electric damage equal to 80% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the closest enemy target within 8 tiles. If this target is the same as that of the Ultimate skill Leaping Arc, the before the attack, applies [effect:e809a359-05d8-42fa-9f90-abf087a5584d] to the target for 2 turns. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0},{"id":"36711be8-5d14-40b5-bdbb-d8fd8b876fec","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

At the end of the buff holder's action, deals 1 instance of Electric damage equal to 110% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to the closest enemy target within 8 tiles. If this target is the same as that of the Ultimate skill Leaping Arc, the before the attack, applies [effect:e809a359-05d8-42fa-9f90-abf087a5584d] to the target for 2 turns. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":1}]}
Upon taking damage from [effect:0fbfd3cd-3787-4137-995f-d5975b378e52], takes one additional instance of fixed damage equal to 100% of attack. Cannot be cleansed.
